race.comment: Plenty of win chances with most with upside. ALPHABET (9) looks overdue for a win after a nine return to finish runner-up at Sale. Looks suited by the extra ground and can go on wit it. TIJOLA (7) was thereabouts fresh when fourth at Werribee fresh. Much fitter and has the blinkers added. Rates highly on best figures. SUMMONED LOU (6) ran a much improved race at second outing and has further upside. Expected to run well. TARA'S CROWN (14) kept coming last time and looks a top chance. SPARKLES (13) is yet to place in nine runs but rarely far way and worth including. ACHY BREAKY HEART (15) has a tricky gate to overcome but nice upside.
